lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਜਿ ਪਉ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak tis saranaaee bhaj pau aape bakhas milaae |4|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, run to His Sanctuary; granting His forgiveness, He merges us into Himself. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਤਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh veparavaahu hai naa tis til na tamaae |
lines.english: My God is independent and self-sufficient; he does not have even an iota of greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿਓ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਕ ਜਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: japio naam suk janak gur bachanee har har saran pare |
lines.english: Suk-deva and Janak meditated on the Naam; following the Guru's Teachings, they sought the Sanctuary of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਲਦੁ ਭੰਜਿ ਸੁਦਾਮੇ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਾਇ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: daalad bhanj sudaame milio bhagatee bhaae tare |
lines.english: God met Sudama and removed his poverty; through loving devotional worship, he crossed over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਉਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam japat udhare |
lines.english: O my mind, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, you will be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਤਾਰਥੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal har naam kritaarath guramukh kripaa kare |1|
lines.english: God is the Lover of His devotees; the Lord's Name is fufilling; God showers His Mercy on the Gurmukhs. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰੂ ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦੁ ਬਿਦਰੁ ਦਾਸੀ ਸੁਤੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhraoo prahilaad bidar daasee sut guramukh naam tare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Dhroo, Prahlaad and Bidar the slave-girl's son, became Gurmukh, and through the Naam, crossed over. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਜੁਗਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਧਾਨੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਉਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kalajug naam pradhaan padaarath bhagat janaa udhare |
lines.english: In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, the Naam is the supreme wealth; it saves the humble devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਾ ਜੈਦੇਉ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਸਭਿ ਦੋਖ ਗਏ ਚਮਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: naamaa jaideo kabeer trilochan sabh dokh ge chamare |
lines.english: All the faults of Naam Dayv, Jai Dayv, Kabeer, Trilochan and Ravi Daas the leather-worker were covered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਗੇ ਸੇ ਉਧਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਪਾਪ ਟਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam lage se udhare sabh kilabikh paap ttare |2|
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh, and remain attached to the Naam, are saved; all their sins are washed off. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਅਪਰਾਧੀ ਸਭਿ ਤਿਨ ਕੇ ਦੋਖ ਪਰਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo naam japai aparaadhee sabh tin ke dokh parahare |
lines.english: Whoever chants the Naam, all his sins and mistakes are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਸੁਆ ਰਵਤ ਅਜਾਮਲੁ ਉਧਰਿਓ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲੈ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਨਰਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: besuaa ravat ajaamal udhario mukh bolai naaraaein narahare |
lines.english: Ajaamal, who had sex with prostitites, was saved, by chanting the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਕੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jan kau aap anugrahu keea har angeekaar kare |
lines.english: God Himself takes pity on His humble servants, and makes them His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਉਗ੍ਰਸੈਣਿ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਤੋੜਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam japat ugrasain gat paaee torr bandhan mukat kare |3|
lines.english: Chanting the Naam, Ugar Sain obtained salvation; his bonds were broken, and he was liberated. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਉਰ ਧਰਿਓ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਰੇ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har kirapaa dhaaree ur dhario naam hare |4|1|
lines.english: The Lord has showered servant Nanak with His Mercy; he has enshrined the Lord's Name within his heart. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਪੈਜ ਰਖੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਗੋਵਿਦੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਉਧਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sevak paij rakhai meraa govid saran pare udhare |
lines.english: My Lord of the Universe saves the honor of His servants; those who seek His Sanctuary are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਧ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਜਪਿਓ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਪਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sidh samaadh japio liv laaee saadhik mun japiaa |
lines.english: The Siddhas in Samaadhi meditate on Him; they are lovingly focused on Him. The seekers and the silent sages meditate on Him as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਜਪਿਓ ਤੇ ਭਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saran pare japio te bhaae guramukh paar peaa |1|
lines.english: Those who seek His Sanctuary meditate on Him; they become Gurmukh and swim across. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੀ ਸਤੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾਦਿਕ ਰਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jatee satee santokhee dhiaaeaa mukh indraadik raviaa |
lines.english: The celibates, the true and contented beings meditate on Him; Indra and the other gods chant His Name with their mouths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਤਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mere man naam japat tariaa |
lines.english: O my mind, chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and cross over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨਾ ਜਟੁ ਬਾਲਮੀਕੁ ਬਟਵਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaa jatt baalameek battavaaraa guramukh paar peaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Dhanna the farmer, and Balmik the highway robber, became Gurmukh, and crossed over. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਕਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੈ ਦੇਵੀ ਜਪਿਓ ਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sankar brahamai devee japio mukh har har naam japiaa |
lines.english: Shiva, Brahma and the goddess Lakhshmi, meditate, and chant with their mouths the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬੇ ਜਪਿਓ ਰਿਖਿ ਬਪੁਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar gan gandharabe japio rikh bapurai har gaaeaa |
lines.english: Angels, men, heavenly heralds and celestial singers meditate on Him; even the humble Rishis sing of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਨਾ ਤੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har har naam jinaa man bheenaa te guramukh paar peaa |2|
lines.english: Those whose minds are drenched with the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, as Gurmukh, cross over. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bed puraan simrit har japiaa mukh panddit har gaaeaa |
lines.english: The Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees meditate on the Lord; the Pandits, the religious scholars, sing the Lord's Praises as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟਿ ਤੇਤੀਸ ਧਿਆਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤਿਆ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kott kott tetees dhiaaeo har japatiaa ant na paaeaa |
lines.english: Millions and millions, three hundred thirty million gods meditate on Him; there is no end to those who meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸਾਲੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਤੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam rasaal jinaa man vasiaa te guramukh paar peaa |3|
lines.english: Those whose minds are filled with the Naam, the source of nectar - as Gurmukh, they cross over. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਏ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gobid kripaa kare thaae paae jo har prabh man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe bestows His Mercy, and those who are pleasing to the Mind of the Lord God, find their place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਤ ਤਰੰਗੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਿਨ ਜਪਿਆ ਮੈ ਗਣਤ ਨ ਕਰਿ ਸਕਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: anat tarangee naam jin japiaa mai ganat na kar sakiaa |
lines.english: Those who chant the Naam in endless waves - I cannot even count their number.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਓ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਇਆ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur dhaar kripaa har naam drirraaeo jan naanak naam leaa |4|2|
lines.english: The Guru, granting His Grace, implants the Lord's Name within; servant Nanak chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||2||
